security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:5173; script-src 'self' http://localhost:5173; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://localhost:5173; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data: http://localhost:5173; font-src 'self' data: http://localhost:5173; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:5173 ws://localhost:5173; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: CSV Anonymizer detects sensitive CSV columns, previews repeatable or smart local transformations, and writes anonymized output without sending data off the device.
